description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test and build. In the test stage add a test job that uses the image registry.gitlab.com/musit-norway/docker-node, installs libelf1, caches node_modules, runs npm install, npm run formatcode, checks that src/ is formatted, and runs npm test. In the build stage add a manual build job that runs only on the master branch of MUSIT-Norway/musit-frontend, uses the image $MUSIT_DOCKER_REGISTRY/musit/docker-node with the $MUSIT_DOCKER_REGISTRY/library/docker:dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay, and in before_script echoes the build ID, creates a Docker config, installs libelf1, shows docker info, and rewrites the Dockerfile base node image to $MUSIT_DOCKER_REGISTRY/library/node. The build job’s script replaces LOCAL_DEVELOPMENT with the commit SHA in src/build.ts, builds and pushes a Docker image $MUSIT_DOCKER_REGISTRY/musit/webpack:$CI_COMMIT_SHA, tags it as utv, and pushes the tag. Also add a manual build release branch job that runs only on release branches, performs the same before_script, replaces LOCAL_DEVELOPMENT with the commit SHA in src/build.js, builds and pushes the image $MUSIT_DOCKER_REGISTRY/musit/webpack:utv, and uses the same tags docker, musit, utv.
